message:
🐛 Fix cluster status dots showing yellow instead of green

Simplified health logic in getClusterStateFromInfo to match isClusterHealthy:
if cluster has nodes (nodeCount > 0), it's healthy. Don't check the healthy
flag which can be inconsistent during refresh cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
